title: LA Studio Picks
description: All model families currently curated and used by LA Studio workflows.

items.reason: Lightweight Qwen3 voice-cloning baseline for fast local iteration.
Larger Qwen3 base model for higher quality voice cloning.
Qwen3 custom voice workflow with reference conditioning.
Qwen3 voice design model for generating voices from text descriptions.
Low-latency VibeVoice realtime TTS through CrispASR with compact preset voice packs.
Vietnamese-focused TTS model for LA Studio speech workflows.
48 kHz VieNeu v3 Turbo ONNX package for Vietnamese-English TTS and reference-audio cloning.
High quality multilingual TTS, voice cloning, and voice design package.
Small multilingual preset-voice TTS with practical CPU runtime options.
30-language VoxCPM2 TTS, voice design, and zero-shot voice cloning through CrispASR v0.8.4.
Offline multilingual speech recognition and translation backend.
Lightweight offline speech-to-text and audio Q&A model.
Medium offline speech-to-text and audio Q&A model.
Streaming-native multilingual ASR with a compact 0.6B local GGUF model.
